case_title: RICK PATEL VS. WILLIAM POWELL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK SERVED OCT-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 POLK STREET #46, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.01 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RICK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, WILLIAM
